data: {"generalSituation":"Winds will be weak and it will be persistently very hot over Guangdong today and tomorrow. High temperatures will also trigger showers. The area of low pressure over the central to southern part of the South China Sea will develop gradually, and move across the northeastern part of the South China Sea towards the vicinity of Taiwan in the next couple of days. Meanwhile, under the influence of its associated subsiding air, it will be extremely hot over Guangdong in the next couple of days. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to linger over the coast of southern China and the northern part of the South China Sea early next week. It will bring showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. Under the influence of an easterly airstream, temperatures over the coast of Guangdong will fall slightly in the middle and latter parts of next week. Besides, Tropical Cyclone Jangmi will skirt the southern part of Honshu of Japan today. It will then transform into an extratropical cyclone gradually.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260603","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 2 to 3.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods and isolated showers.
